stemHtml: At FL140 on a scheduled international flight, the data-link becomes unserviceable 30 minutes into cruise. What about weather observations?

options.a: Routine observations still auto-transmit every 15 minutes regardless.
options.b: Attempt to restart data-link so routine observations resume.
options.c: Exempt from both routine and special observations.
options.d: Special observations must be reported by voice since data-link is unavailable.
